name: Intel NUC + ASRock consumer motherboards (AMI Aptio variant)
description: Intel NUC kits and ASRock motherboards ship AMI Aptio firmware (with per-vendor customisation). CRTM_VERSION identifies the board + BIOS revision.

entries.bios-update-path: Intel NUC BIOS Update utility + LVFS
entries.notes: Intel sold the NUC line to ASUS in 2023; post-acquisition BIOS strings include 'ASUS NUC' or 'ASUS NUC Pro' prefixes. Older Intel-branded NUCs continue to receive BIOS updates from Intel through end-of-support dates.

platforms: ASRock Rack server boards (AMD EPYC / Xeon)
entries.notes: ASRock boards commonly ship Nuvoton NPCT7xx TPMs. ASRock Rack server line uses either the same or Infineon depending on model.

source: Intel NUC BIOS release notes; ASRock motherboard BIOS catalogue.
